violations.text: The ceiling in the kitchen and ware wash area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Approved finish material sheet provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Sink and surface sanitizer solution was in excess of 1875 parts per million (ppm). A sink and surface solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Establishment to add water to sanitizer and test sanitizer when filling sanitizer buckets. PIC called technician at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen and ware wash area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Approved finish material sheet provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen and ware wash area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Approved finish material sheet provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Sink and surface sanitizer solution was in excess of the recommended parts per million (ppm) . Sink and surface sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC to get dispenser serviced. Until fixed establishment to add water to dilute solution and test to ensure it falls within the manufacturers recommended amount. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Hot holding door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Lowboy hot hold door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
